# opnsense_quagga_ospf6_redistribution (Data Source)

Reads an OSPFv3 redistribution on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this redistribution is enabled.
- `redistribute` (String) Source to redistribute into OSPFv3.
- `route_map` (String) UUID of a route map to apply.
